findings.summary: Barrel modules carry multi-line commentary for near-trivial re-exports.
evidence: `src/shared/hooks/useShots.ts` uses a 6-line explanatory header above a single `export * from './shots'`.
`src/types/shots.ts` has a multi-line deprecation block above one re-export.
`src/shared/components/SegmentSettingsForm/components/index.ts` adds a docblock for only two obvious exports.
findings.suggestion: Trim barrel-file comments to one concise compatibility note only where needed, and move migration/background details to a dedicated migration doc.

findings.summary: Several helper files use repetitive docstrings that mostly restate signatures.
evidence: `src/shared/lib/errorHandling/errorUtils.ts` repeats one-line purpose comments above tiny guards like `isError`, `isErrorWithCode`, and `isErrorWithStatus`.
`src/shared/hooks/useProcessingTimestamp.ts` includes extensive explanatory prose and example usage around a thin wrapper that delegates to `useLiveTimestamp`.
findings.suggestion: Collapse repeated prose into a short module-level contract and keep per-function comments only for non-obvious behavior (e.g., DOMException edge cases).

findings.summary: Aspect-ratio parsing/fallback logic is duplicated across utilities.
evidence: `getAspectRatioStyle` in `src/shared/components/ShotImageManager/utils/image-utils.ts` parses `w:h` and falls back to `'1'`.
`getImageAspectRatioStyle` in `src/shared/lib/imageAspectRatio.ts` duplicates the same parse/`isNaN`/fallback pattern for project ratio handling.
findings.suggestion: Extract a shared `parseAspectRatio` helper and reuse it in both modules to remove copy-paste formulaic logic.

findings.summary: Debug polling methods repeat the same try/catch/log/boolean template.
evidence: `testConnection` and `testTaskStatusQuery` both implement nearly identical flow: run query, log error, return false, catch/log, return false.
The repeated error-handling template creates boilerplate-heavy debugging code with little per-method differentiation.
findings.suggestion: Add a shared `runDebugCheck(label, checkFn)` wrapper for standardized error handling and move method-specific logic to query construction only.
